requirement_topic.en: NEA Grid Connection — 230/400 V / 50 Hz and Site-Level Capacity Coordination
requirement_topic.zh: NEA并网接入——230/400 V / 50 Hz及场地级容量协调
requirement_topic.zht: NEA併網接入——230/400 V / 50 Hz及場地級容量協調

summary.en: Nepal Electricity Authority (NEA) is Nepal's integrated public electricity utility and the practical gatekeeper for grid-connected EV charger installations. Nepal's low-voltage supply is commonly specified as 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz. EV charging deployment must be coordinated with NEA or the relevant distribution office for supply capacity, metering, service upgrade, protection, earthing, commissioning, and tariff treatment. Nepal's electricity mix is hydro-dominant and EV charging is supported by the policy logic of using domestic electricity instead of imported petroleum, but site conditions remain uneven: urban and highway corridors are developing charging coverage faster than rural or mountain locations. Harmonics, flicker, load management, and power-quality evidence aligned with IEC 61000 should be prepared for connected chargers.
summary.zh: 尼泊尔电力局（NEA）是尼泊尔综合性公用电力机构，也是并网电动汽车充电桩安装的实务关口。尼泊尔低压供电通常为单相230 V / 三相400 V、50 Hz。EV充电部署须与NEA或相关配电办公室协调供电容量、计量、供电升级、保护、接地、调试和电价处理。尼泊尔电力以水电为主，EV充电具有使用本国电力替代进口石油的政策逻辑，但场地条件仍不均衡：城市和公路走廊的充电覆盖发展快于农村或山区地点。联网充电设备应准备符合IEC 61000的谐波、闪变、负载管理和电能质量证据。
summary.zht: 尼泊爾電力局（NEA）是尼泊爾綜合性公用電力機構，也是併網電動汽車充電樁安裝的實務關口。尼泊爾低壓供電通常為單相230 V / 三相400 V、50 Hz。EV充電部署須與NEA或相關配電辦公室協調供電容量、計量、供電升級、保護、接地、調試和電價處理。尼泊爾電力以水電為主，EV充電具有使用本國電力替代進口石油的政策邏輯，但場地條件仍不均衡：城市和公路走廊的充電覆蓋發展快於農村或山區地點。聯網充電設備應準備符合IEC 61000的諧波、閃變、負載管理和電能品質證據。

standards_or_laws: NEA (Nepal Electricity Authority) — utility connection and distribution approval for grid-connected installations
Nepal low-voltage supply context — 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility, harmonics, flicker, and power quality
Project-specific NEA load, metering, protection, and commissioning requirements

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are accepted under GB/T 18487.1-2023 design evidence, GB/T 20234 connectors, GB/T 27930-2023 communication for DC systems, and local grid-operator project acceptance. China domestic supply is 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz. The frequency matches Nepal, but Nepal's nominal voltage is higher at 230/400 V, so input-voltage range, protection thresholds, transformer or rectifier ratings, metering, and thermal derating must be checked against NEA site requirements.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装依据GB/T 18487.1-2023设计证据、GB/T 20234接口、直流系统GB/T 27930-2023通信，以及当地电网运营商项目验收。中国国内供电为单相220 V / 三相380 V、50 Hz。频率与尼泊尔相同，但尼泊尔标称电压较高，为230/400 V，因此输入电压范围、保护阈值、变压器或整流器额定值、计量及热降额须按NEA场地要求核查。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝依據GB/T 18487.1-2023設計證據、GB/T 20234接口、直流系統GB/T 27930-2023通訊，以及當地電網運營商項目驗收。中國國內供電為單相220 V / 三相380 V、50 Hz。頻率與尼泊爾相同，但尼泊爾標稱電壓較高，為230/400 V，因此輸入電壓範圍、保護閾值、變壓器或整流器額定值、計量及熱降額須按NEA場地要求核查。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm: (1) input-voltage range covers 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz with Nepal grid tolerance; (2) NEA or distribution-office capacity review is completed for the site; (3) single-line diagram, load calculation, protection settings, earthing design, metering plan, harmonic data, and commissioning records are prepared; (4) load management is included where several DC chargers could stress local feeders; (5) public or commercial charger tariff and metering treatment are confirmed before installation. A China domestic 220/380 V design is close but not automatically Nepal grid-ready.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认：(1) 输入电压范围覆盖单相230 V / 三相400 V、50 Hz并考虑尼泊尔电网容差；(2) 已完成NEA或配电办公室的场地容量审查；(3) 已准备单线图、负荷计算、保护整定、接地设计、计量方案、谐波数据和调试记录；(4) 多台直流充电桩可能冲击本地馈线时纳入负载管理；(5) 安装前确认公共或商业充电桩的电价和计量处理。中国国内220/380 V设计接近但不能自动视为满足尼泊尔并网要求。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認：(1) 輸入電壓範圍覆蓋單相230 V / 三相400 V、50 Hz並考慮尼泊爾電網容差；(2) 已完成NEA或配電辦公室的場地容量審查；(3) 已準備單線圖、負荷計算、保護整定、接地設計、計量方案、諧波數據和調試記錄；(4) 多台直流充電樁可能衝擊本地饋線時納入負載管理；(5) 安裝前確認公共或商業充電樁的電價和計量處理。中國國內220/380 V設計接近但不能自動視為滿足尼泊爾併網要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — NEA or the relevant distribution office must coordinate and accept grid-connected supply, metering, and commissioning for EV charger sites; exact requirements are site-specific
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid operator acceptance applies domestically and is not an NEA approval substitute; Nepal voltage, metering, and site-capacity requirements must be separately satisfied

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Nepal uses a 230/400 V 50 Hz utility context, close to but not identical with China's 220/380 V baseline. A Nepal-ready charger package needs voltage-range confirmation, NEA site-capacity coordination, metering and protection documentation, and IEC 61000 power-quality evidence before installation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 尼泊尔采用230/400 V 50 Hz公用电网背景，接近但不等同于中国220/380 V基线。面向尼泊尔的充电桩资料包在安装前需要电压范围确认、NEA场地容量协调、计量和保护文件，以及IEC 61000电能质量证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 尼泊爾採用230/400 V 50 Hz公用電網背景，接近但不等同於中國220/380 V基線。面向尼泊爾的充電樁資料包在安裝前需要電壓範圍確認、NEA場地容量協調、計量和保護文件，以及IEC 61000電能品質證據。
